health-supplement-tr.notes: Server-side trend exports should ingest through R2 eigen-ingest; add public sitemap URLs if exposed.

project-darling.notes: Current app is UI-only; use file and sitemap ingest unless a backing data model is added.

smartplrx-trend-tracker.notes: Centralized trends export via scripts/export-trends-to-r2.mjs; source_system smartplrx.

_instructions: To ingest content for a site: (1) Add sitemap/RSS URLs above, (2) Drop files in its knowledge/ subdirectory, (3) Add its domain to EIGEN_FETCH_ALLOWLIST in Supabase Edge Function secrets, (4) Run the ingestion workflow.
